payload.answer: Unable to extract memory from the article because the fetch resulted in a 404 network error.
payload.decision: No durable memory committed because the fetch failed with a 404 network error and the source content was unavailable.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be resolved or fetched, so no stable entity should be created.

payload.intent: Remember an article referenced by a malformed URL-like string and extract durable memory from it.

details: No extractable article content was available.

repair_options: Retry with a valid article URL.
Confirm whether the intended URL was https://example.com/missing or a different address.
